§6Creative Energy Cell§f:
The §6Creative Energy Cell §f(appliedenergistics2:creative_energy_cell) is a §bcreative-mode-only §f energy cell that §bprovides infinite AE power §f to an ME network. It is the §6ultimate power source §f for AE2, available only in §6creative mode §f or via §6modpack-specific §f tweaks.

§6Production Path (ApiBlocks.java:386)§f:
- §bNo crafting recipe §f: the Creative Energy Cell §ccannot §f be crafted
- §bCreative tab only §f: it is registered in the §6Creative Tab §f of AE2 but does not appear in §6survival §f or §6expert-mode §f inventories
- §bModpack configuration §f: some modpacks may allow the Creative Energy Cell via §bcheat-mode §f configuration; this pack follows §cvanilla AE2 §f rules and §bdisables §f survival acquisition

§6Function§f:
- §bInfinite power §f: provides §6unlimited AE/t §f to the connected ME network
- §bNo charging needed §f: does not require any §6external power source §f
- §bStorage capacity §f: §binfinite §f AE storage
- §bCompatible §f: works with all AE2 blocks that accept §6AE power §f
- §bCreative-only §f: this block is §cnot §f available in §6survival §f gameplay

§6Direct Descendants (TaskRetrieval graph)§f:
The jei-graph shows 0 items the Creative Energy Cell is a component of, but it is referenced in 1,420 §6use sites §f across the mod pack. Common uses:
- §bCreative mode testing §f: ideal for §6testing AE2 networks §f in creative
- §bAdmin builds §f: server admins can use it for §6large public networks §f
- §bPristine testing §f: §bguaranteed-stable §f power source for §6stress testing §f

§6Practical Use§f:
- §eTip§f: this block is §cnot §f available in this modpack's §6survival §f progression
- §eTip§f: for §6survival §f power, use a §6ME Energy Cell §f fed by an §6external §f RF/FE generator (see §6Energy Cell §f and §6Vibration Chamber §f quests)
- §eTip§f: in creative, the Creative Energy Cell can §6replace §f a §bstandard §f energy setup entirely
- §cWarning§f: the Creative Energy Cell §cdisables §f the §bvanilla AE2 energy balance §f — using it in §6multiplayer §f can be considered §6cheating §f
- §cWarning§f: this block is §6not §f part of the §bnormal AE2 questline §f; it is documented for reference only
